text:
DSA Notes Sample - Sushanth Contribution
Stack follows LIFO principle. Push and Pop operations run in O(1) time.
A stack is used in function call management, undo operations, and expression evaluation.
embedding_model: SAMPLE-PLACEHOLDER (run generate_embeddings.py for real BGE vectors)

text:
Queue follows FIFO principle. Enqueue and Dequeue operations run in O(1) time.
Binary search runs in O(log n) time on a sorted array using divide and conquer.
A graph consists of vertices and edges, traversed using DFS or BFS algorithms.
embedding_model: SAMPLE-PLACEHOLDER (run generate_embeddings.py for real BGE vectors)

text:
Linked lists allow O(1) insertion at the head but O(n) traversal to find an element.
Merge sort runs in O(n log n) time using a divide and conquer strategy.
embedding_model: SAMPLE-PLACEHOLDER (run generate_embeddings.py for real BGE vectors)

text:
Binary trees have a root, internal nodes, and leaves; traversal can be inorder, preorder, or postorder.
Stack follows LIFO principle. Push and Pop operations run in O(1) time.
embedding_model: SAMPLE-PLACEHOLDER (run generate_embeddings.py for real BGE vectors)
